title: SEED354 (import) - List charges supports cursor pagination
description: GET /v1/charges returns next_cursor when more than page size.
preconditions: Token with charges.read; at least 25 charges in UAT.
expected_result: Second request with cursor returns remaining rows without duplicates.

title: SEED354 (import) - Revoked key returns 401 with oauth error code
description: Use revoked client secret; expect structured OAuth error body.
preconditions: Revocation propagated to all gateway nodes (wait 60s).
expected_result: 401; error=invalid_client; no body leak of internal ids.
